errors.noUser: No signed-in user was found. Please log in again.

alerts.logoutMessage: Do you want to log out?

steps.buildTypeTitle: What type of build are you managing?
steps.buildStageTitle: What stage is your build at?

buildStageInfo.stan_zero: Choose this if you are starting earthworks and foundations.
buildStageInfo.stan_surowy_otwarty: Choose this if foundations are done and you are starting the house structure and load-bearing walls.
buildStageInfo.stan_surowy_zamkniety: Choose this if the house structure is done and you are starting the roof, joinery or facade.
buildStageInfo.instalacje: Choose this if the building is closed and you are starting internal installations.
buildStageInfo.wykonczenie: Choose this if installations are done and you are starting work that prepares the home for living.

budget.previewHint: After typing, we show the amount clearly, e.g. 80,000 or 800,000.
budget.initialExpenseName: Expenses incurred before starting to use the app
budget.heroText: Enter the planned budget and costs already paid so the app can track expenses better.

alerts.prepareError: Failed to prepare the starter guide.

welcome.title: Welcome, I'm {{buddy}}
welcome.subtitle: Your construction supervisor
welcome.body: I'll help you keep the build under control step by step, and now I'll show you how BuildIQ will support you.

project.title: Project
project.body: Add project details, drawings and a 3D model, and keep the key information always at hand.

budget.title: Budget under control
budget.body: You get a clear view of the build budget and current costs in one place. See what is planned, what has been spent, and where to keep a buffer.

progress.title: Build progress
progress.body: You can see the current stage and what is already done, so it is easier to keep the work moving.

control.title: Check out the remaining features
control.progress: Progress - see what is already done and what is still ahead
control.photos: Photos - document the build and revisit it whenever you need
control.documents: Documents - keep contracts, invoices and important files tidy
